core.label: CoffeeScript Fundamentals
core.description: Syntactic sugar that compiles to JavaScript.

topics.label: Installation & Compilation
topics.description: Install with npm. CoffeeScript compiles 1:1 to readable JavaScript.

topics.label: Variables & Functions
topics.description: No var/let — just assignment. Arrow functions (->), fat arrows (=>). Indentation-based.

topics.label: Strings & Interpolation
topics.description: Double-quoted strings with #{expression} interpolation. Heredocs with triple quotes.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/else/unless as expressions, for comprehensions, while, switch/when.

topics.label: Classes
topics.description: class with constructor, extends, super. Cleaner than ES5 prototype-based OOP.

topics.label: Destructuring & Splats
topics.description: Array and object destructuring, ... splat operator.

topics.label: Comprehensions
topics.description: for x in array when condition — list comprehensions built into the language.

topics.label: Existential Operator
topics.description: ? for null checks, ?. for safe property access. CoffeeScript had this before JS.
